channel.title: Zeitschrift für Kristallographie - Crystalline Materials
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Kristallographie - Crystalline Materials

item.title: An Fe(III) derivative of (R)-sirtinol: bis(nitrato)-(2-(((2-(oxy)-1-naphthyl)methylene)amino)-N-(1-phenylethyl)-benzamidato)-iron(III) tetrahydrofuran solvate. Its crystallization mode, chirality nomenclature, and biochemical implications thereof
item.description: Article by Ivan Bernal, Roger A. Lalancette DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zkri-2024-0096
